message:
feat(ops): add view presets, control-plane self-monitoring, and expanded fleet dashboard

Expand the FrankenTUI operations console with progressive-disclosure
view presets, control-plane health integration, and significantly
richer fleet overview screens.

presets.rs (new):
- Define view presets: FleetTriage, ProjectDeepDive, IncidentMode, LowNoise
- Density modes: Compact, Normal, Expanded for progressive disclosure
- Filtering toggles: hide healthy instances, sort unhealthy first
- ViewState management for preset + density + filter composition

app.rs:
- Refactor from direct fleet_screen ownership to fleet_screen_id in
  screen registry (consistent with TUI architecture)
- Add ViewState field for preset/density/filter management
- Integrate control_plane_metrics() refresh cycle
- Add control_plane_health() badge to status line
- Add self_check_report() diagnostic output
- New render() method composing shell + overlay rendering

overlays.rs:
- Expand command palette action catalog with view presets (Fleet Triage,
  Project Deep Dive, Incident Mode, Low Noise), density cycling, filter
  toggles, and control-plane self-check action

screens/fleet.rs:
- Expand fleet overview with richer per-project dashboards (~208 new lines)
- Add sync_fleet_screen_state() for state synchronization

state.rs:
- Expand state management (~264 new lines) for view state, filter
  criteria, and dashboard data

data_source.rs, preferences.rs, lib.rs:
- Minor updates for new module exports and type changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
